name: nexus-shorts-engine
description: MCP configuration for the Nexus-Shorts-Engine autonomous agent. All secrets are referenced via environment variables loaded from .env (gitignored). Never commit real values.

postgres.description: Read/write access to the Nexus PostgreSQL database.

filesystem.description: Scoped filesystem access to the Nexus solution root.

rules: Never invent third-party UI selectors or API keys.
Halt and surface a HUMAN INPUT REQUIRED block when secrets or selectors are missing.
All persistence must go through Entity Framework Core targeting PostgreSQL.
All rendered videos must apply micro-zoom (1-2%), LUT color grading, and -22dB ducking.
